text: I feel a sense of calm and curiosity in these spaces. In the first room, with its glass walls and quiet observer at a desk, I sense the anticipation of ideas to be shared, the deliberate hush before a gathering. The second image resonates with intellectual excitement—a vibrant display, words and images about research and imagination. I feel the pulse of creativity, the urge to pause and ponder the questions raised by this environment dedicated to discovery and thoughtful connection.
